creator: kristinacors
caption: If you’re in Sydney make sure you don’t miss out on the food at THIS restaurant! #travelbucketlist #sydneyaustralia #bestrestaurantsinsydney #wheretoeatinsydney #visitsydney @bartiga.syd

transcription.text: Come with us to a Sydney restaurant you have to try before it becomes impossible to get a reservation. We had a girls night here and the whole experience exceeded our expectations. First, they somehow served us cocktails that matched our outfits because apparently they understood the assignment. No, I'm not kidding about this, and the drinks were elite. From that moment on, we knew the experience was going to be special. After all the cocktails, the food came out and the food was insane. We ordered the Betta Leaf, Kingfish Crudo, Prawn Toast Sando, and the Stracciatella. And I'm not exaggerating when I say it's the best meal I've had all year. Everything from the flavors, the presentation, completely blew us away. You honestly can't go wrong with anything on the menu. So definitely save this for your next girls night. The name of this restaurant is Bartiga and it's in Double Bay. Add it to your bucket list now because this is one of those places you'll still be thinking about weeks later. And don't forget to follow for more recommendations in Sydney and around the world.
